title: F.B.I. Girl
writer: Dwight V. Babcock, Richard H. Landau, Rupert Hughes
actors: Cesar Romero, George Brent, Audrey Totter
plot: A governor planning to run for U.S. Senate has a secret past that could prove damaging to his political aspirations: he's a convicted murderer, and that will come to light if the FBI does an investigative check on him. He goes to ...
